dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6827 IH: All American Metal Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Vindman (for himself, Mr. Moylan, and Mr. Lawler) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Ways and Means

form.official-title: To amend the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 to expand the advanced manufacturing production credit to include recycled copper, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the All American Metal Act.

section.header: Expansion of advanced manufacturing production credit to include recycled copper

subsection.text: Section 45X(c)(6) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 is amended—

paragraph.text: by redesignating subparagraphs (I) through (AA) as subparagraphs (J) through (BB), respectively, and
by inserting after subparagraph (H) the following new subparagraph:

clause.text: purified to a minimum purity of 99.9 percent copper by mass.

subsection.text: The amendments made by this section shall apply to components produced and sold in taxable years beginning after December 31, 2024.
